view_definition:
SELECT id,
    person_id,
    admission_no,
    admission_date,
    category_id,
    religion_id,
    blood_group_id,
    status_id,
    created_at,
    updated_at,
    deleted_at,
    school_id
   FROM students
  WHERE ((deleted_at IS NULL) AND (status_id = 1));

SELECT id,
    first_name,
    middle_name,
    last_name,
    display_name,
    dob,
    gender_id,
    nationality_code,
    photo_url,
    created_at,
    updated_at,
    deleted_at
   FROM persons
  WHERE (deleted_at IS NULL);

SELECT c.name AS class_name,
    s.name AS section_name,
    p.display_name AS teacher_name,
    ay.code AS academic_year
   FROM (((((class_sections cs
     JOIN classes c ON ((cs.class_id = c.id)))
     JOIN sections s ON ((cs.section_id = s.id)))
     JOIN academic_years ay ON ((cs.academic_year_id = ay.id)))
     LEFT JOIN staff st ON ((cs.class_teacher_id = st.id)))
     LEFT JOIN persons p ON ((st.person_id = p.id)));

SELECT r.code AS role,
    string_agg((p.code)::text, ', '::text) AS permissions
   FROM ((roles r
     LEFT JOIN role_permissions rp ON ((r.id = rp.role_id)))
     LEFT JOIN permissions p ON ((rp.permission_id = p.id)))
  GROUP BY r.code;

SELECT id,
    student_id,
    amount_due,
    amount_paid,
    discount,
    status,
    due_date,
    created_at,
    updated_at,
    deleted_at
   FROM student_fees;
